mermaidSyntax:
flowchart TD A[Health screening] --> B[PPE donning sequence
N95 respirator fit check
Tyvek suit, double gloves
shoe covers, face shield] B --> C[Decontamination shower] C --> D[Airlock entry
Negative pressure verification] D --> E[Work procedures] E --> F{Pathogen handling
Centrifuge protocols
Sharps disposal} F --> G{Spill occurs?} G -->|Small spill| H[Small spill response
Local decontamination] G -->|Large spill| I[Large spill response
Evacuate, HazMat team] G -->|No spill| J[Waste autoclave cycle] H --> J I --> J E --> K{Emergency?} K -->|Exposure incident| L[Exposure protocol
Immediate decontamination] K -->|Fire| M[Fire evacuation protocol] K -->|Power/Ventilation failure| N[Emergency shutdown procedure] J --> O[Exit: PPE doffing sequence] O --> P[Hand washing + shower] P --> Q[Health log entry] Q --> R[Annual recertification check]
